templates.name: Do you offer free stickers?
templates.content:
To stoke you out with complimentary Nixon stickers, please send us a self-addressed, stamped envelope to:

NIXON
Attn: Stickers
2810 Whiptail Loop, Suite 101
Carlsbad, CA 92010

Stickers will be returned in your provided envelope. Please allow up to two weeks for delivery.

templates.name: Do you offer cleaning services?
templates.content: I'm afraid we do not offer any type of cleaning service, just repairs.

templates.name: How do I look at future tide on my High Tide watch?
templates.content: Using the bottom left pusher toggle to "tide" and using the bottom right pusher click to advance to a future date.

templates.name: How do I change the display on my High Tide watch?
templates.content: You just need to press the top right pusher to change the display setting.

templates.name: How do I view the next high tide on my Base Tide Pro watch?
templates.content: Just click the bottom right pusher and you'll be able to see the next high tide.

templates.name: How do I set the time on my Re-Run watch?
templates.content: Press and hold the left button for 3 seconds to enter the Time Setting. Press the left button to advance through the setting sequence. Then press the right button to change the current value.

templates.name: How do I change the tide location on my High Tide watch?
templates.content: Hold the bottom left pusher for 5 seconds and using the bottom right pusher, toggle through the settings. It will bring you to different tide locations.

templates.name: How do I change the tide location on my Base Tide Pro watch?
templates.content: Just click the bottom left pusher and cycle to "tide". Don't touch for 5 seconds and using the top for future dates and the bottom right pusher for past dates, cycle through high & low.

templates.name: How do I use chrono on my Base Tide Pro watch?
templates.content: Using the bottom left pusher select "chrono". Use the top right pusher to add time and start, then press and hold the bottom right pusher to zero out.

templates.name: How do I add wave count on my Base Tide Pro watch?
templates.content: Using the bottom left pusher select "timer". Once here click the upper right pusher to add # for countdown. Then press again to start/timer and the bottom right pusher to add wave count. Press and hold the bottom right pusher to zero out.

templates.name: How do I set the alarm on my Re-Run watch?
templates.content: Press the right button to scroll through the options and go to the alarm page. Press and hold right for 3 seconds to turn the Alarm on and off, or press and hold left to enter the alarm setting, and then toggle between hour and minutes. Press right to increase current value.

templates.name: How do I set the timer on my Re-Run watch?
templates.content: Press the right button to scroll through the options and go to the timer page. Then press and hold the left button for 3 seconds to enter the Timer Setting. Once there press the left button to advance through the setting sequence and press the right button to change the current value. Then press the left button to start and stop the countdown timer press the right button, this is only possible when the timer is stopped. When the timer expires a single beep alarm will be heard.

templates.name: Sentry watch motor reset
templates.content: Pull the crown out all the way, from here set the time to 6:30 pm and then 6:30 am. Then push the crown back in.

templates.name: How do I change the date on my Sentry watch?
templates.content: Pull the crown half way. Rotate clockwise to change the day of the week and rotate counterclockwise to change the date.

templates.name: How do I look for future sun/moon on my High Tide watch?
templates.content: Using the bottom left pusher toggle to "sun/moon" and using the bottom right pusher click to advance to a future date.

templates.name: How do I turn off the beep on my Heat watch?
templates.content: Go to the time page and press and hold the left button, which will take you to the settings page. Then press the left pusher to cycle through the options. One of the options will be beep, and just press the right pusher to turn it off.

templates.name: What is the processing time for your custom orders?
templates.content: Please allow 5-10 business days for processing. It's worth the wait!

templates.name: How do I turn off the timer on my Heat watch?
templates.content: Hold down the left pusher, then cycle through the settings by tapping it. It will bring you to sound and once it does, click the right pusher to toggle it off.

templates.name: What does the Nixon name and symbol mean?
templates.content: The name Nixon was simply chosen as a fun and strong name that would make people wonder. Numerous names were thrown around when the company was started, and Nixon was the one everyone unanimously agreed on. As far as the Nixon symbol goes, it consists of three components. The inside shape represents the bottom of hourglass. The outside shape represents the wings of time, and the whole shape together represents a flame. These three symbols were chosen to represent something that is timeless.

templates.name: Can I have a link removed?
templates.content: I would suggest going to a local jeweler or sending it to us via our Online Repair Center ( https://nixon.attn.tv/sl/h3GdD-oP ) to remove links. Our team's happy to help!

templates.name: Do you have a band that’s compatible with my watch?
templates.content: Happy to help you find a band for your watch! Can you please tell me the model of the watch you need a band for? Alternatively, you can find the list of watches that are compatible with the bands we sell on the site by going to this page: https://www.nixon.com/pages/watch-bands# and using the "find band by model" feature. If your watch is not listed, I would suggest sending it in for service here: https://service.nixon.com/requests/new

templates.name: Do you sell any smartwatches?
templates.content: No, I'm afraid we don't sell smartwatches.

templates.name: Will you restock The Player watch? Will you restock the Tupac / 2PAC watch?
templates.content: I'm afraid it was a limited edition watch and will not be coming back.

templates.name: I need extra links
templates.content: You may call our team at 1.888.455.9200 to order more links. The links are free, there is just a small shipping fee. Also, be sure to check the bottom of your watch box to see if it came with additional links. They would be in the small envelope that the user manual comes in.

templates.name: How do I care for the coating on my watch?
templates.content: The coating on your watch is part of the exclusivity of its design and it gives your watch a unique color. Like all fine watches, your watch needs to be treated with care. Hard scratches and abrasion will scratch the coating off your watch.

templates.name: How do I prepare my Ripley before I go underwater?
templates.content: Before you wear your Ripley underwater, pull the plastic stopper behind the crown, set the time, and push the crown in completely. Now you are good to get out there. You can also watch this video for more information on how to set up your Ripley watch https://www.nixon.com/blogs/stories/how-to-set-up-your-ripley-watch

templates.name: Do you see watch cases or stands?
templates.content: Sorry, we do not currently sell cases or stands to display your rad Nixon collection. Keep your eye on our website, we sometimes sell accessories for watches.

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: I can check if that's possible. What's the order number, email address and the change you'd like to make?

templates.name: Military / First responder / Healthcare
templates.content: Thank you for your service! Simply look for the ID.me verification in your cart as you complete your order. Click the "Verify" button and follow the steps!

templates.name: How do I care for my leather watchband?
templates.content: Regularly cleaning your leather watchband with a damp cloth will prolong the luster and life of the strap. To keep the watchband in good condition, treat your band with a mild leather treatment. This will prevent drying and cracking. It's best to remove your watch while sleeping and don't expose your leather band to water. You can also check out our cleaning tips here: https://www.nixon.com/blogs/stories/how-to-clean-a-leather-watch-band

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: The best way to discuss wholesale is to email us directly at support@nixon.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: What are the standard lengths of your watch bands?
templates.content: For men's watches with sizing holes, band lengths range from 132mm to 196mm. Women's band lengths range from 126mm to 177mm. If your watch has removable links, you can add or remove links as needed to fit your wrist.

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: Our processing time takes 1-2 business days and we usually ship via USPS or UPS. Once shipped, it will take 2-7 business days for domestic orders.

templates.name: What is the processing time for the engraved watch?
templates.content: Please allow 3-5 business days for us to build your one-of-a-kind watch. It's worth the wait!

templates.name: Can a local jeweler repair my watch or will it void the warranty?
templates.content: Watches will not be covered by warranty if someone other than an authorized Nixon service technician opens the case back during the 2-year warranty period. If your watch is outside of the 2-year warranty period, feel free to take it to a certified jeweler at your discretion.

templates.name: Do I need to register my watch?
templates.content: You don't need to register your watch to validate a warranty claim, but hold on to your sales receipt. We may ask for original proof of purchase from an authorized Nixon seller.

templates.name: What is the custom and engraved watch return policy?
templates.content: Our engraved and custom watches can't be exchanged or refunded. Custom watches can be returned as a warranty claim for defects in materials or workmanship, under our Warranty Policy.

templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content: We offer free standard shipping on all domestic orders.

templates.name: What temperatures can my watch safely withstand?
templates.content: Your watch can withstand temperatures from 14 to 113 degrees Fahrenheit (-10 to 45 degrees Celsius).

templates.name: How do I start up my digital watch?
templates.content: Select digital models have sleep mode in place to preserve battery power. You can take your watch out of sleep mode easily by pressing and holding the light pusher. Check out the user manual for your watch that will detail any special steps needed for your specific model.

templates.name: I lost my proof of purchase, can I still have my watch serviced?
templates.content: Absolutely! We'll do our best to keep your Nixon on your wrist. Go to our Online Repair Center here https://service.nixon.com/requests/new?locale=en-US Tell us about your watch, what's wrong with it, and we'll provide you with a repair estimate. For warranty claims, you're required to provide proof of purchase from an authorized Nixon seller.

templates.name: Are bands covered under your warranty?
templates.content: We don't cover normal wear and tear of watch bands or bracelets. We do sell a line of watch bands in a variety of colors and materials that fit most of our watches.

templates.name: What does 5 ATM mean? 10 ATM?
templates.content: ATM (standard atmosphere) is a unit of atmospheric pressure at sea level. If your watch has a 5 ATM water rating, it can handle submersion up to 50 meters deep and it can withhold your daily hand washes and shallow submersion. If your watch has a 10 ATM water rating it can handle submersion up to 100 meters deep and it can handle anything from rain to swimming and surfing.

templates.name: Brand ambassador / Affiliate program
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! You can sign up for our affiliate program here: https://www.nixon.com/pages/affiliate

templates.name: How do I service or repair my watch?
templates.content: You can go to our Online Repair Center here: https://service.nixon.com/requests/new?locale=en-US and tell us about your watch, what's wrong with it, and we'll provide you with a repair estimate. If you agree to the estimate, we'll send you an authorized service order number with shipping instructions. When we receive your watch(es), a Nixon technician will determine the repairs needed. An email will be sent to you for repair cost approval or input required to process and close your service order. You will not be charged if the repair is covered under our Warranty Policy.

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: You can give us a call at (888) 455-9200 or let me know if I can help via text, it may be faster.

templates.name: Return policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy here: https://www.nixon.com/pages/return-policy If you have any questions, please give us a call at (888) 455-9200 or email us at support@nixon.com. One of my colleagues will be more than happy to help out!

templates.name: Customer support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to give us a call at 888-455-9200 or email us directly at support@nixon.com. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: My watch is outside the warranty, can I still have it serviced?
templates.content: For sure! If we have the parts, our Nixon Service Center can service your watch. And if you don't have a receipt, we can still help. Simply go to our Online Repair Center here https://service.nixon.com/requests/new?locale=en-US Tell us about your watch, what's wrong with it, and we'll provide you with a repair estimate. If you agree to the estimate, we'll send you an authorized service order number with shipping instructions.

templates.name: How should I store the watch when not in use?
templates.content: Store your watch in a cool, dry area out of direct sunlight. If you have an automatic watch, using a winder will help to keep it on time when it isn't on your wrist.

templates.name: How do I reset my Digital Tide watch?
templates.content: You can reset the software on your digital tide watch by pressing and holding all 4 side buttons simultaneously for 5 seconds. A tone will sound every 1 second as the watch resets. The following sequence will happen once the watch software resets: all segments will light up, sound will beep for 1 second, ROM will be displayed on screen.

templates.name: What recommendations do you have for Surf watch care and maintenance?
templates.content: Properly caring for your Surf watch is the best way to keep it out of our Service Center. Check out our blog on Surf Watch Care Tips for a breakdown on best practice: https://www.nixon.com/blogs/stories/nixon-surf-watch-care

templates.name: Social Media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/nixon/ and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/nixon/

templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: You can find us at a store near you here: https://www.nixon.com/pages/stores

templates.name: Warranty policy
templates.content: You can take a look at our full warranty policy here: https://www.nixon.com/pages/warranty

templates.name: Retroactive discount request
templates.content: Please email us at support@nixon.com or give us a call at (888) 455-9200. One of my colleagues will be more than happy to help out and issue a refund for the discount amount.

templates.name: Do you offer engraving?
templates.content: Yes, we do! You can take a look at our Engravable Watches here: https://www.nixon.com/collections/engraved-watches

templates.name: Can I get replacement parts for my watch?
templates.content: Which parts exactly would you like replacements for? I'd be happy to check with my team.

templates.name: What's your holiday shipping schedule/ Will my item be here by Christmas?
templates.content: Good question! Feel free to check our Holiday Shipping policy here for more information: https://www.nixon.com/pages/shipping-policy Hope it helps.

templates.name: Automated text
templates.content: Please note that the text is automated and you may receive it prior to receiving your product.

templates.name: Do codes work on customized watches?
templates.content: Our discount codes will unfortunately not work on customized watches.

templates.name: I need a new / replacement looper!
templates.content: Please give us a call at (888) 455-9200 to request a new looper, our team's happy to help!

templates.name: Do you offer engraving at your store/dealer?
templates.content: We only engrave watches purchased on Nixon.com, we do everything in-house!

templates.name: Can I customize any of the digital watches?
templates.content: I'm afraid the only watches that can be customized are the ones available on our custom page here: https://www.nixon.com/pages/custom-watches

templates.name: Do you purchase the watches back or where can I sell it?
templates.content: We do not purchase watches back. You can go through eBay, Offer Up, Facebook marketplace, etc. if you are looking to sell it.
